#  Which file formats are supported when exporting a project's submittals? 
##  Answer 
If you want to export the submittals on a project, you have different file format options that depend upon the active view (see [Switch Between Submittals Views](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/switch-between-submittals-views)). The table below summarizes the export options for each view.  
| Items  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| Packages  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Spec Sections  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Ball In Court  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
| Recycle Bin  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  | ![Icon Mindtouch Table Check](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/4c853aba888369fe8ea04edccf599a8c/6f08b1d930626d13737f5882b8366dcf/icon-mindtouch-table-check.png?fm=webp&h=18)  |   |  
You can also export individual submittals to the Portable Document Format (PDF). For instruction, see [Export a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/export-a-submittal).
